requirement_topic.en: US Market Access — Electrical Safety Listing (NRTL) and Authority Having Jurisdiction (AHJ) Approval
requirement_topic.zh: 美国市场准入 — NRTL电气安全认证与地方审管机构（AHJ）批准
requirement_topic.zht: 美國市場準入 — NRTL電氣安全認證與地方審管機構（AHJ）批准

summary.en: Liquid cooling equipment installed in US data centers is typically required by customers, workplace-safety practice, and AHJs to carry a listing mark from an OSHA-recognized Nationally Recognized Testing Laboratory (NRTL) or to pass an AHJ-accepted field evaluation. UL 62368-1 (Audio/Video, Information and Communication Technology Equipment) is a common NRTL evaluation standard, but the binding obligation is the adopted electrical/building code, OSHA-recognized NRTL framework, permit condition, or contract — not UL 62368-1 by itself. Where the National Electrical Code (NEC) is adopted, Article 110.3(B) requires listed or labeled equipment to be installed and used in accordance with its listing and labeling. Final installation also requires sign-off from the local Authority Having Jurisdiction (AHJ), typically the city or county building official, who enforces applicable adopted codes and local amendments.
summary.zh: 在美国数据中心安装的液冷设备，通常会因客户要求、工作场所安全实践和AHJ审批而需要取得OSHA认可的全国认可测试实验室（NRTL）认证标志，或通过AHJ认可的现场评估。UL 62368-1（音视频及信息通信技术设备）是常见的NRTL评估标准，但具有约束力的义务来自已采纳的电气/建筑规范、OSHA认可的NRTL制度、许可条件或合同，而非UL 62368-1本身。在《国家电气规范》（NEC）被采纳的辖区，第110.3(B)条要求已列名或标识设备按照其列名和标识说明安装和使用。最终安装还需获得地方审管机构（AHJ）——通常为市或县建筑主管官员——的批准，AHJ负责执行已采纳的适用规范及地方修订版。[未经核实：部分AHJ可接受NRTL出具的现场评估报告，作为定制或单件系统工厂认证的替代方案。]
summary.zht: 在美國數據中心安裝的液冷設備，通常會因客戶要求、工作場所安全實踐和AHJ審批而需要取得OSHA認可的全國認可測試實驗室（NRTL）認證標誌，或通過AHJ認可的現場評估。UL 62368-1（音視頻及資訊通訊技術設備）是常見的NRTL評估標準，但具有約束力的義務來自已採納的電氣／建築規範、OSHA認可的NRTL制度、許可條件或合同，而非UL 62368-1本身。在《國家電氣規範》（NEC）被採納的轄區，第110.3(B)條要求已列名或標識設備按照其列名和標識說明安裝和使用。最終安裝還需獲得地方審管機構（AHJ）——通常為市或縣建築主管官員——的批准，AHJ負責執行已採納的適用規範及地方修訂版。[未經核實：部分AHJ可接受NRTL出具的現場評估報告，作為定制或單件系統工廠認證的替代方案。]

standards_or_laws.name: UL 62368-1 (3rd Ed.) — Audio/Video, IT and Communication Technology Equipment Safety
standards_or_laws.notes: Voluntary consensus standard commonly used by NRTLs for IT/data-center electrical equipment; it becomes required only when selected by the NRTL, incorporated by code/AHJ, or imposed by contract.

standards_or_laws.name: OSHA NRTL Program — 29 CFR 1910.7
standards_or_laws.notes: Defines the NRTL program; listing under an OSHA-recognized NRTL (UL, CSA, Intertek/ETL, etc.) satisfies NEC listing requirements.

source.publisher: US Occupational Safety and Health Administration (OSHA)

standards_or_laws.name: NFPA 70 (NEC) Article 110.3(B) — Equipment Installation per Listing
standards_or_laws.notes: Requires that listed equipment be installed and used in accordance with its listing and labeling instructions; enforced by AHJ at permit/inspection stage.

summary.en: In China, electrical safety for data-center equipment is governed primarily by the GB 4943.1 series (Safety of IT Equipment) and GB/T 19216 series (Fire and Overcurrent Protection). For liquid cooling systems specifically, GB 50174-2017 (Code for Design of Electronic Information System Room) sets facility-level requirements. Certification is typically obtained through China Compulsory Certification (CCC / 3C) for consumer electronics, but data-center infrastructure often relies on voluntary CB/CQC schemes; AHJ-equivalent inspection is performed by local fire bureaus (消防局) and construction authorities.
summary.zh: 在中国，数据中心设备的电气安全主要依据GB 4943.1系列（信息技术设备安全）及GB/T 19216系列（防火与过流保护）。针对液冷系统，GB 50174-2017（电子信息系统机房设计规范）规定了机房层面的要求。认证通常通过强制性产品认证（CCC/3C）取得（适用于消费类电子），但数据中心基础设施更多依赖自愿性CB/CQC方案；地方消防局及建设主管部门承担与AHJ相当的验收职能。[未经核实：UL 62368-1对应液冷/浸没式冷却硬件的精确GB标准映射关系截至2026年仍在演进中。]
summary.zht: 在中國，數據中心設備的電氣安全主要依據GB 4943.1系列（資訊技術設備安全）及GB/T 19216系列（防火與過流保護）。針對液冷系統，GB 50174-2017（電子資訊系統機房設計規範）規定了機房層面的要求。認證通常透過強制性產品認證（CCC/3C）取得（適用於消費類電子），但數據中心基礎設施更多依賴自願性CB/CQC方案；地方消防局及建設主管部門承擔與AHJ相當的驗收職能。[未經核實：UL 62368-1對應液冷／浸沒式冷卻硬件的精確GB標準對應關係截至2026年仍在演進中。]

standards_or_laws.name: GB 4943.1 — Safety of IT Equipment
standards_or_laws.notes: CN functional equivalent to IEC/UL 62368-1 for IT electrical safety; mandatory CCC only applies to certain product categories — data-center cooling infrastructure often falls outside CCC scope.

source.publisher: State Administration for Market Regulation (SAMR) — National Standards Database

standards_or_laws.name: GB 50174-2017 — Code for Design of Electronic Information System Room
standards_or_laws.notes: Governs data-center facility design in China including cooling system requirements; enforced by local construction authorities.

source.publisher: State Administration for Market Regulation (SAMR) — National Standards Database

gap.en: The primary gap is the NRTL/AHJ approval pathway: US market entry for data-center liquid cooling equipment commonly requires a UL, ETL, CSA, or equivalent NRTL listing or field evaluation under the applicable NRTL product category; UL 62368-1 is one common evaluation standard, not a standalone legal mandate. Chinese GB certifications are not recognized by US AHJs as substitutes for adopted-code compliance. Testing and listing costs and timelines (typically 3–9 months for new product categories) are material. Additionally, each installation requires AHJ approval, which varies by jurisdiction and may trigger local code amendments beyond the base NEC. China's GB-centric approval pathway does not transfer: a CCC mark or GB test report holds no standing with a US AHJ unless specifically accepted for a narrow purpose.
gap.zh: 主要差距在于NRTL/AHJ审批路径：进入美国市场的数据中心液冷设备通常需要取得UL、ETL、CSA或同等NRTL机构在适用产品类别下的认证或现场评估；UL 62368-1是常见评估标准之一，并非独立的法律强制要求。中国GB认证不被美国AHJ认可为已采纳规范合规的替代。测试与认证的费用及周期（新产品类别通常为3至9个月）是重要的商业障碍。此外，每个安装项目均需获得AHJ批准，因辖区而异，且可能触发超出基础NEC要求的地方规范修订。中国以GB为核心的审批路径无法直接转换：CCC标志或GB检测报告在美国AHJ面前不具法律效力，除非被特定接受用于有限目的。
gap.zht: 主要差距在於NRTL/AHJ審批路徑：進入美國市場的數據中心液冷設備通常需要取得UL、ETL、CSA或同等NRTL機構在適用產品類別下的認證或現場評估；UL 62368-1是常見評估標準之一，並非獨立的法律強制要求。中國GB認證不被美國AHJ認可為已採納規範合規的替代。測試與認證的費用及週期（新產品類別通常為3至9個月）是重要的商業障礙。此外，每個安裝項目均需獲得AHJ批准，因轄區而異，且可能觸發超出基礎NEC要求的地方規範修訂。中國以GB為核心的審批路徑無法直接轉換：CCC標誌或GB檢測報告在美國AHJ面前不具法律效力，除非被特定接受用於有限目的。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory obligation comes from OSHA workplace rules, adopted electrical/building codes, and AHJ permit/inspection approval. NRTL listing or field evaluation is commonly required by AHJs/customers; UL 62368-1 is a voluntary consensus standard used for evaluation unless incorporated by code, AHJ condition, or contract.
mandatory_status.cn: Partially mandatory — GB 50174-2017 mandatory for facility design; CCC mandatory only for listed product categories (data-center cooling infrastructure often exempt); local fire/construction inspection mandatory

source.publisher: US Occupational Safety and Health Administration (OSHA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Informational only. A Chinese liquid cooling manufacturer entering the US data-center market should plan for NRTL listing or AHJ-accepted field evaluation before installation in US facilities. UL 62368-1 may be the applicable evaluation standard, but the legal gate is the adopted code and AHJ approval. GB certifications held in China do not substitute. Engage an accredited NRTL early; budget 3–9 months and material testing fees for a new product category. Consult legal counsel for jurisdiction-specific AHJ requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅供参考。中国液冷设备制造商进入美国数据中心市场前，应规划取得NRTL认证或AHJ认可的现场评估，方可在美国设施中安装。UL 62368-1可能是适用评估标准，但法律门槛来自已采纳规范和AHJ批准。在中国持有的GB认证不能替代上述要求。建议尽早联系经认可的NRTL机构；新产品类别测试通常需预留3至9个月及相应测试费用。具体辖区AHJ要求请咨询法律顾问。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅供參考。中國液冷設備製造商進入美國數據中心市場前，應規劃取得NRTL認證或AHJ認可的現場評估，方可在美國設施中安裝。UL 62368-1可能是適用評估標準，但法律門檻來自已採納規範和AHJ批准。在中國持有的GB認證不能替代上述要求。建議盡早聯繫經認可的NRTL機構；新產品類別測試通常需預留3至9個月及相應測試費用。具體轄區AHJ要求請諮詢法律顧問。

requirement_topic.en: US Market Access — Hyperscaler Operator Qualification (OCP / De-Facto Commercial Gate) and Federal/Government Supply-Chain Requirements (NDAA)
requirement_topic.zh: 美国市场准入 — 超大规模运营商资质认可（OCP及事实商业门槛）与联邦/政府数据中心供应链要求（NDAA）
requirement_topic.zht: 美國市場準入 — 超大規模運營商資質認可（OCP及事實商業門檻）與聯邦/政府數據中心供應鏈要求（NDAA）

summary.en: Beyond legal/code compliance, commercial access to large US hyperscaler data centers (Microsoft, Meta, Google, Amazon) is gated by operator qualification programs. The Open Compute Project (OCP) publishes open hardware specifications — including liquid cooling interoperability standards under OCP's Cooling Environments project (formerly the Advanced Cooling Solutions workgroup, now consolidated) — and hyperscalers increasingly require OCP conformance or their own vendor qualification audits (factory assessment, thermal/hydraulic performance validation, cybersecurity questionnaire). This is a de-facto commercial requirement, not law. For federal and government-operated data centers, the National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA) Section 889 bans procurement of telecommunications and video surveillance equipment from specified Chinese entities (Huawei, ZTE, Hikvision, Dahua, Hytera and their subsidiaries/affiliates); broader supply-chain scrutiny under Executive Orders on securing the ICT supply chain may also apply to data-center cooling infrastructure.
summary.zh: 除法规合规要求外，进入大型美国超大规模数据中心（微软、Meta、谷歌、亚马逊等）的商业渠道还受运营商资质认可体系的约束。开放计算项目（OCP）发布开放硬件规范，包括OCP冷却环境项目（原先进冷却解决方案工作组，现已整合）制定的液冷互操作性标准；超大规模运营商日益要求供应商符合OCP规范或通过其自有的供应商资质审核（工厂审核、热/液压性能验证、网络安全调查问卷）。上述要求属于事实商业门槛，并非法律强制。对于联邦及政府运营的数据中心，《国防授权法》（NDAA）第889条禁止采购特定中国实体（华为、中兴、海康威视、大华、海能达及其子公司/关联方）的电信和视频监控设备；基于行政命令的更广泛ICT供应链安全审查也可能适用于数据中心冷却基础设施。[未经核实：非NDAA第889条点名的中国OEM厂商所提供的液冷硬件，目前是否面临点名实体清单之外的额外采购禁令——投标联邦合同前请咨询法律顾问。]
summary.zht: 除法規合規要求外，進入大型美國超大規模數據中心（微軟、Meta、谷歌、亞馬遜等）的商業渠道還受運營商資質認可體系的約束。開放計算項目（OCP）發布開放硬件規範，包括OCP冷卻環境項目（原先進冷卻解決方案工作組，現已整合）制定的液冷互操作性標準；超大規模運營商日益要求供應商符合OCP規範或通過其自有的供應商資質審核（工廠審核、熱／液壓性能驗證、網絡安全調查問卷）。上述要求屬於事實商業門檻，並非法律強制。對於聯邦及政府運營的數據中心，《國防授權法》（NDAA）第889條禁止採購特定中國實體（華為、中興、海康威視、大華、海能達及其子公司／關聯方）的電信和視頻監控設備；基於行政命令的更廣泛ICT供應鏈安全審查也可能適用於數據中心冷卻基礎設施。[未經核實：非NDAA第889條點名的中國OEM廠商所提供的液冷硬件，目前是否面臨點名實體清單之外的額外採購禁令——投標聯邦合同前請諮詢法律顧問。]

standards_or_laws.name: OCP Cooling Environments — Liquid Cooling Specifications
standards_or_laws.notes: Open Compute Project publishes interoperability specs for rack-level and facility-level liquid cooling under the Cooling Environments project (formerly Advanced Cooling Solutions / ACS, now consolidated). Hyperscaler RFQs increasingly reference OCP conformance. Not a law but a practical gate for hyperscaler sales.

standards_or_laws.name: NDAA FY2019 Section 889 — Prohibition on Certain Telecommunications and Surveillance Equipment
standards_or_laws.notes: Applies to federal procurement and contractors receiving federal funds. Named entities: Huawei Technologies, ZTE Corporation, Hytera Communications, Hangzhou Hikvision Digital Technology, Dahua Technology, and their subsidiaries/affiliates. Does not currently name liquid cooling OEMs by name, but prime contractors must certify compliance and may conduct broader supply-chain reviews.

source.publisher: Electronic Code of Federal Regulations (eCFR) — Federal Acquisition Regulation 52.204-25

standards_or_laws.name: Executive Order 13873 (2019) — Securing the ICT Supply Chain / ICTS Rule (15 CFR Part 7)
standards_or_laws.notes: The ICTS rule empowers the Department of Commerce to block or impose conditions on ICT transactions involving foreign adversary entities. Whether data-center liquid cooling hardware falls within ICTS jurisdiction depends on whether it contains networking/communications components — consult legal counsel for specific product classification.

source.publisher: Electronic Code of Federal Regulations (eCFR) — 15 CFR Part 7

standards_or_laws.name: ASHRAE TC 9.9 — Thermal Guidelines for Data Processing Environments (5th Ed.)
standards_or_laws.type: Industry Guideline (Referenced by AHJs and Operators)
standards_or_laws.notes: ASHRAE TC 9.9 guidelines are widely referenced by data-center operators and increasingly cited by AHJs. Liquid cooling systems should demonstrate compliance with thermal envelope and coolant safety guidelines. Not a law, but non-compliance creates commercial and permitting friction.

source.publisher: American Society of Heating, Refrigerating and Air-Conditioning Engineers (ASHRAE)

summary.en: China does not have a direct equivalent to OCP operator qualification for hyperscaler procurement — Chinese hyperscalers (Alibaba Cloud, Tencent, Huawei Cloud) run proprietary vendor qualification programs. For government data centers, GB/T 22239 (Baseline for Classified Protection of Cybersecurity, a.k.a. MLPS 2.0) and GB 50174-2017 govern facility and equipment requirements; supply-chain security for government procurement is addressed under the Cybersecurity Law (2017) and Data Security Law (2021). There is no direct CN analog to NDAA Section 889 restrictions targeting specific foreign entities for data-center hardware.
summary.zh: 中国没有与超大规模运营商OCP采购资质直接对应的等效体系——中国超大规模云服务商（阿里云、腾讯云、华为云）各自运行独立的供应商资质认证程序。对于政府数据中心，GB/T 22239（网络安全等级保护基本要求，即等保2.0）和GB 50174-2017规定了设施及设备要求；政府采购的供应链安全依据《网络安全法》（2017年）和《数据安全法》（2021年）进行管理。中国没有与美国NDAA第889条针对特定境外实体的数据中心硬件限制相对应的直接等效法规。
summary.zht: 中國沒有與超大規模運營商OCP採購資質直接對應的等效體系——中國超大規模雲服務商（阿里雲、騰訊雲、華為雲）各自運行獨立的供應商資質認證程序。對於政府數據中心，GB/T 22239（網絡安全等級保護基本要求，即等保2.0）和GB 50174-2017規定了設施及設備要求；政府採購的供應鏈安全依據《網絡安全法》（2017年）和《數據安全法》（2021年）進行管理。中國沒有與美國NDAA第889條針對特定境外實體的數據中心硬件限制相對應的直接等效法規。

standards_or_laws.name: GB/T 22239-2019 — Baseline for Classified Protection of Cybersecurity (MLPS 2.0)
standards_or_laws.type: Mandatory National Standard (for government/critical-infrastructure data centers)
standards_or_laws.notes: Governs cybersecurity and supply-chain requirements for classified data centers in China. Functional analog to federal data-center security frameworks in the US, but does not restrict foreign vendors by national origin in the same way NDAA does.

source.publisher: State Administration for Market Regulation (SAMR) — National Standards Database

gap.en: Two distinct gaps exist for Chinese liquid cooling manufacturers targeting US commercial and government data centers: (1) Commercial gap — OCP operator qualification and hyperscaler vendor audits are de-facto requirements with no CN equivalent pathway. A Chinese OEM must independently complete OCP conformance testing and pass each hyperscaler's vendor qualification process, which typically includes factory audits, performance benchmarking, and cybersecurity assessments. (2) Federal/government gap — NDAA Section 889 and broader ICTS supply-chain rules create heightened scrutiny for Chinese-origin hardware in federal procurement. Even if a product is not sold by a named entity, prime contractors may require written certification of no covered-entity components throughout the supply chain. The combination means Chinese liquid cooling OEMs face both technical qualification barriers (OCP) and geopolitical supply-chain scrutiny (NDAA/ICTS) in the US government segment — two hurdles with no parallel in the Chinese domestic market.
gap.zh: 针对美国商业及政府数据中心的中国液冷设备制造商面临两类独立差距：（1）商业差距——OCP运营商资质认可和超大规模云商供应商审核是事实上的准入要求，在中国没有对等的申请路径。中国OEM须独立完成OCP符合性测试，并通过各超大规模运营商的供应商资质流程（通常包括工厂审核、性能基准测试及网络安全评估）。（2）联邦/政府差距——NDAA第889条及更广泛的ICTS供应链规则对联邦采购中的中国原产硬件形成更高级别审查。即便产品并非由点名实体出售，主承包商也可能要求书面证明整个供应链中不含受限实体的组件。上述双重壁垒意味着中国液冷OEM在美国政府市场面临技术资质障碍（OCP）与地缘政治供应链审查（NDAA/ICTS）的叠加挑战——两道门槛在中国国内市场均无对应情形。
gap.zht: 針對美國商業及政府數據中心的中國液冷設備製造商面臨兩類獨立差距：（1）商業差距——OCP運營商資質認可和超大規模雲商供應商審核是事實上的準入要求，在中國沒有對等的申請路徑。中國OEM須獨立完成OCP符合性測試，並通過各超大規模運營商的供應商資質流程（通常包括工廠審核、性能基準測試及網絡安全評估）。（2）聯邦／政府差距——NDAA第889條及更廣泛的ICTS供應鏈規則對聯邦採購中的中國原產硬件形成更高級別審查。即便產品並非由點名實體出售，主承包商也可能要求書面證明整個供應鏈中不含受限實體的組件。上述雙重壁壘意味著中國液冷OEM在美國政府市場面臨技術資質障礙（OCP）與地緣政治供應鏈審查（NDAA/ICTS）的疊加挑戰——兩道門檻在中國國內市場均無對應情形。

mandatory_status.target: OCP qualification: Not mandatory by law — de-facto commercial requirement for hyperscaler sales. NDAA Sec. 889: Mandatory for all federal contractors and subcontractors. ASHRAE 9.9: Not mandatory by law — referenced by AHJs and operators.
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent to OCP qualification. MLPS 2.0 mandatory for classified government data centers. No equivalent to NDAA named-entity procurement ban.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Informational only. For commercial hyperscaler sales: engage with OCP conformance process and each target operator's vendor qualification program before production scale-up — these are de-facto gates. For US government / federal sales: obtain qualified legal advice on NDAA Section 889 scope and ICTS rules before bidding; even if not a named entity, supply-chain certification requirements are extensive. ASHRAE TC 9.9 thermal compliance should be documented as standard practice. This row reflects the regulatory and commercial landscape as understood in mid-2026; supply-chain rules are actively evolving and require ongoing monitoring.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅供参考。针对商业超大规模运营商销售：在规模化生产前，须与OCP符合性流程及各目标运营商的供应商资质程序对接——这些是事实商业门槛。针对美国政府/联邦采购销售：投标前务必就NDAA第889条适用范围及ICTS规则寻求合格法律意见；即便并非点名实体，供应链认证要求也十分繁琐。ASHRAE TC 9.9热管理合规应作为标准惯例予以记录。本栏信息反映2026年中期的监管及商业环境；供应链规则处于积极演变中，需持续关注动态。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅供參考。針對商業超大規模運營商銷售：在規模化生產前，須與OCP符合性流程及各目標運營商的供應商資質程序對接——這些是事實商業門檻。針對美國政府／聯邦採購銷售：投標前務必就NDAA第889條適用範圍及ICTS規則尋求合格法律意見；即便並非點名實體，供應鏈認證要求也十分繁瑣。ASHRAE TC 9.9熱管理合規應作為標準慣例予以記錄。本欄資訊反映2026年中期的監管及商業環境；供應鏈規則處於積極演變中，需持續關注動態。
